---
applyTo: "src/**"
---

# App Source Instructions

## Documentation
| README | Contents |
|---|---|
| [`README.md`](../../README.md) | Project overview, dev commands, key dependencies |

**Pipeline READMEs** (sibling repo `micha-stocks-fan/`):
| README | Contents |
|---|---|
| `pipeline/README.md` | Architecture, shared modules, environment variables |
| `pipeline/course/README.md` | How course content is generated (lessons, sections, course.json) |
| `pipeline/insights/README.md` | How market insight reports are generated (content/reports/) |

## Overview
The `src/` directory contains the Next.js frontend for the Micha Stocks Fan portal. It is a TypeScript app using the App Router, Tailwind CSS, and ESLint.

## Project Structure
```
src/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ layout.tsx        # Root layout
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ page.tsx          # Home / course index
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ globals.css       # Global Tailwind styles
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lesson/           # Dynamic lesson pages
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ reports/          # Market insight reports browser + detail pages
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ConceptCard.tsx           # Concept display card
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CourseBrowser.tsx         # Course browser
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Footer.tsx                # Site footer with disclaimer
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ InlineMarkdown.tsx        # Inline markdown renderer
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ PrintableReportContent.tsx# Print-friendly report layout
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ReportCard.tsx            # Summary card for a single report
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ReportMarkdown.tsx        # Markdown renderer for report content
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ TickerLinks.tsx           # Converts ticker symbols to external links
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ VideoPlayer.tsx           # YouTube embed player
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ course.json       # Auto-generated вЂ” do not edit manually
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ sections.json     # Auto-generated вЂ” do not edit manually
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ sections.ts       # Runtime interface for section data
в””в”Ђв”Ђ lib/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ reports.ts        # Server-side helpers for reading report files from content/reports/
```

## Rules
- **Always use TypeScript** вЂ” no plain `.js` files in `src/`.
- Use **PascalCase** for component filenames and exports (e.g., `ConceptCard.tsx`).
- Style with **Tailwind CSS utility classes** вЂ” avoid inline styles or separate CSS files unless absolutely necessary.
- Keep components in `src/components/`. Page-level code belongs in `src/app/`.
- `src/data/course.json` is auto-generated by the pipeline вЂ” never edit it manually.
- `src/data/sections.json` is auto-generated by the data pipeline вЂ” never edit it manually.
- `src/data/sections.ts` imports from `sections.json` and exports `SECTIONS`, `LESSON_SECTION`, `SECTION_COLORS`, and helper functions вЂ” it is the runtime interface for section data.
- `src/lib/reports.ts` contains server-side helpers (`getAllReports()`, `getReport(date, time)`, `getAllReportParams()`) that read report files from the sibling pipeline repo. Do not duplicate report data in `src/data/`. Place shared server utilities in `src/lib/`.
- Follow the **App Router** conventions (file-based routing, `layout.tsx`, `page.tsx`).
- Run ESLint before committing: `npm run lint`.
- Report pages and their markdown content are in **Hebrew** and must render RTL (`dir="rtl" lang="he"`). Do not change this.
- When working with charts or data visualisations, use the installed **recharts** skill (`.github/skills/recharts/SKILL.md`).
- When building new UI components or design tokens, use the installed **tailwind-design-system** skill (`.github/skills/tailwind-design-system/SKILL.md`) вЂ” it targets Tailwind v4 which this project uses.

## Environment Variables
| Variable | Required? | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `REPORTS_DIR` | No | Override path to report files; defaults to `../micha-stocks-fan/content/reports` |

## Dev Commands
- Always run these commands from the repo root (`/Users/arielbroitman/Code/micha-stocks-fan-app/`).

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Start dev server (http://localhost:3000)
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build

# Serve the production build
npm start

# Run ESLint
npm run lint
```

## Key Data Types

### `Lesson` (from `src/data/course.json`)
```typescript
type Lesson = {
  id: string;                    // e.g. "027_Moving_Averages"
  title: string;
  source?: string;               // YouTube URL
  learn_items?: string[];        // Bullet-point learning objectives
  concepts: {
    title: string;
    body: string;
    timestamp?: number;          // Seconds into video
  }[];
  takeaways?: { text: string; level: number }[];  // вљ пёЏ NOT string[] вЂ” level is 1/2/3
  glossary?: { term: string; definition: string }[];
  important_context?: string | null;
};
```

### `ReportMeta` / `ReportDetail` (from `src/lib/reports.ts`)
```typescript
type ReportMeta = {
  date: string;       // "YYYY-MM-DD"
  time: string;       // "HH-MM"
  videoId: string;
  title: string;
  published: string;  // ISO datetime
  url: string;        // YouTube URL
};
type ReportDetail = ReportMeta & { content: string }; // raw Hebrew markdown
```

### `SectionDef` (from `src/data/sections.ts`)
```typescript
type SectionDef = { id: string; label: string; color: string };
// SECTION_COLORS[id] = { badge, badgeBg, hover, dot, accent, text }
```
